title: Meme music discs
description: This resource pack makes the normal music discs to your favourite meme songs!
body:
This Resource Pack adds the following sounds: 

**Tears** -> We are Charlie Kirk

**5** -> McDonalds sound 

**11** -> what is this diddy blud doing on the Calc(Calc is short for calculator)

**cat** -> trippi troppi burbaloni(idk how it is called)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/annwjyYqNtk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Feel free to suggest some other sounds on GitHub!
